title: Images Pre-upload (waiting for other data)
content:
Due to technical issues with the website server today, uploading photographs has been somewhat difficult. Therefore, while the server is functioning properly, we are temporarily uploading the photographs in advance before the press note is finalized. We kindly seek your understanding and cooperation.

title: HNAHTHIAL ATANGA THINGSAI PANNA KAWNG SIAM HNA CHAK ZAWKA KALPUI A NIH THEIH NAN HNAHTHIAL SP IN LIRTHEI TLAN DAN TUR RUAHMANNA A SIAM
content:
443/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 8th May, 2026 :Hnahthial atanga Thingsai panna kawngpui chu siamthat hna thawh mek niin chak zawka hnathawh a nih theih Hnahthial SP, Pu Shivam Siddharth chuan he kawnga tlan dan tur chu a hnuaia tarlan ang hian ruahmanna a siam.

Dt. 08.05.2026 (Zirtawpni) atanga Dt. 30.05.2026 (Inrinni) inkar chhung hian Hnahthial to Thingsai kawng hi block a ni a. Zin veivak leh helai kawng hmang mamawhtute tan zing lam dar 6:00 atanga dar 9:30 a.m. bakah dar 12:30 p.m. atanga dar 01:00 p.m. inkarah helai kawngpui hi hawn thin a ni ang.

Thupek hian Magistrate/Police/F&ES leh medical duty lirthei chevel te a huam lovang.

Thupek zawm lo chu MV Act Section 179 hmangin an chungah hmalak a ni ang.

title: LUNGLEIAH HLAWHTLING TAKIN 44TH RAJYA STARIYA BAL VAIGYANIK PRADARSHANI (STATE LEVEL SCIENCE EXHIBITION) BUATSAIH A NI
content:
442/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 8:44th Rajya Stariya Bal Vaigyanik Pradarshani (State Level Science Exhibition tia hriat ṭhin) chu May ni 7–8, 2026 chhung khan Government High School Lungleiah hlawhtling taka buatsaih a ni a. Vawiina a kharna inkhawm buatsaih chu Lunglei West bialtu MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia'n Khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan Science leh Mathematics-in ramri kham a nei lo tih sawiin, Science chu thu dik leh thil tak taka tawp ṭhin, subject danglam leh ropui tak a nih thu a sawi a. India-in kum 2047-a Atmanirbhar Bharat (Developed India) nih a tumnaah tuna zirlaite hian tih theih an ngah thu leh an tel ve tlat thu sawiin, zirlaite Science Exhibition-a an tihchhin leh thil hmuh chhuahte leh Science-a an thil zirte chu an ni tin nuna hmang ṭangkai zel turin a chah a. Science leh technology hmanga tualchhuak thil thar chin chhuah leh ngaihtuah chhuah tum zel tur te, chhim lam kawngpui lian sial mek KMMTTP-in remchanna leh hna tam tak a siam tur chhawr ṭangkai thei tura ṭawng leh thiamna ngaite lo nei lawk turin zirlaite a fuih bawk.

Vawiina Science Exhibition kharna leh lawmman semna inkhawm hi Lunglei District Education Officer & District Project Coordinator Pu Micky R. Lalenkawla'n a kaihruai a. SCERT Deputy Director Pu F. Lalliansanga chuan report pein, India ramin kum 2047-a ram intodelh leh ngelnghet (Viksit leh Atmanirbhar Bharat) nih a tum hlawhtlinna atan Science zirna pawimawhzia te, Science Exhibition lo chhuah dan leh zirna hmasawn nana rahbi pawimawh tak a nih thu te a sawi a. Endiktu ai awhin IASE Assistant Professor Dr J. Lalsangzuala chuan endik nana tehfung an hman te sawiin, zirlai naupangte hmasawnna leh theihna chhuanawm a tih thu a sawi a. NCERT DESM Prof. Ramavatar Meena pawhin Science Exhibition hlawhtling taka Mizoramin a kalpui chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Govt HS Lunglei Headmaster Pu K. Lalsangkima'n lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

RSBVP hi Mizorama Science leh Mathematics zirna tihhmasawn nan leh chawi lar nana Mizoram State Council of Educational Research & Training (SCERT) Science Promotion Wing (SPW), Lunglei District Samagra Shiksha leh NCERT, New Delhi te ṭang kawp-in an huaihawt a ni a. Kumin hian thupui (theme) atan "STEM for Viksit and Atmanirbhar Bharat" tih hman a ni.

Science Exhibition chhung hian May ni 7, 2026 khan "One Day Seminar on Popularisation of Science" chu buatsaih niin, District Institute of Education & Training (DIET) Lunglei Principal Pi Lalremruati Fanai chuan a kaihruai a. Seminar thupui atan "Reducing Plastic Pollution" (Plastic Bawlhhlawh Tihtlem) tih hman niin, thupui hi Lunglei Government College Zoology Department-a Associate Professor Pu R. Lalrochama chuan a sawi zau va. SCERT Deputy Director Pu F. Lalliansanga'n Science zirna tihhmasawnna atana sawrkar hma lakna chi hrang hrangte sawiin, INSPIRE Awards MANAK chungchang inkawhhmuhna hun hman a ni bawk.

Science Exhibition hi Dr J. Lalsangzuala (Assistant Professor, IASE), Dr T. Malsawmtluanga (Assistant Professor, Lunglei Govt College) leh Pu PC Lalrintluanga (Science Consultant, Science Promotion, SCERT) te'n endikin, sub-theme pasarih thlan chhuah hmangin endikna hi kalpui a ni.

Exhibition-a telte write up hi National Science Exhibition atan NCERT, New Delhi-ah thawn tur niin, chumi aṭang chuan National Science Exhibition-a tel tur an lo thlang chhuak dawn a. Science Exhibition aṭang hian Mizo naupang ṭhahnem takin hlawhtlinna lo chang tawhin, an zir zelnaah leh eizawnna kawng hrang hrangah nasa takin a lo pui tawh ṭhin a ni.

Attachment

title: SCHOOL EDUCATION MINISTER-IN MEIOA CONFERENCE A HMANPUI
content:
441/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 8th May, 2026 :Vawiin khan  Aijal Club-ah School Education Minister Dr Vanlalthlana'n Mizoram Education Inspecting Officers' Association General Conference a hmanpui.

Minister Dr Vanlalthlana chuan he hunah hian thusawiin Inspecting Officer te chu zirna kawnga an thawhhonaah lawmthu a hrilh a. Zirna kawnga an thawhhonaah  danglamna an siam chho zel tih sawiin dawih taka ke pen an tum lo tih a sawi. Tun hnaia danglamna an siam chu thawhhona rah a ni a, officer leh zirtirtute thawhrimna rah a ni tih sawiin Chief Minister nen an lawmthu a sawi.

Minister chuan tun hnaia result an tih chhuah dan chu thil thar a ni lova Board lianah leh state dangah pawh an hman lai reng a ni  tih a sawi a. Zirlaite hian an examah hian mark hnih khat lekin Division sang an pha lo thei a, mark hnih khat leka dinhmun inthlau taka dah hi naupang zirna lama chak lo zawk tan a tha lova, a titha tan chuan mark sang an hmuh hian an lawm thova, a tichhe deuh tihnual thei division hi tul an ti lo tih a sawiin zirna lama mi entawn Finland phei chuan kum 20 chuang ranking hi an kalpui tawh lo tih a sawi.

Minister chuan Inspecting Officer te chu Performance Grading Index-ah hma kan sawn theih nan ngaihtuahna hmang zel tur leh a tul chuan workshop cum round table conference te pawh huaihawt turin a sawm bawk.

Minister chuan kan kutah kan ram hma lam hun hi a awm a, dam chhung daih danglamna thlen tura ke kan pen tlan a ngai tiin officer rual te chu a sawm a ni.

MEIOA General Conference-ah hian an paw hmalakna tur chi hrang hrang an rel a, an pawl hruaitu tur an thlang thar bawk. President : Pu PC Lalngaizuala Vice President: Pu JR Lalhruaitluanga,  Gen Secretary : Pu Vanlalchhana, Asst Secretary: Pu Andrew Lalrintluanga, Information Secretary: Pi K.Lalsiamliani, Finance Secretary : Pi Jenny MS Dawngkimi, Jt Secretary: Pu C.Lalthanzira, Treasurer: Pi Carolyn Rinthanpuii te an ni.

MEIOA Conference ah hian Pi K.Lalsiamliani chuan lawmthu a sawinaah Mizoram sorkarin tun hnaia a tha zawnga danglamna a thlen hnalakah advertisement chhuah ziah te, aikal tih tawp te, Quarters sak hnathawh tha an tih thu te leh sorkarin zirna kawnga hma a lakna hrang hrang lawmawm an tih thu a sawi.

MEIOA General Conference hi session li-ah an then a, report an ngaihthlak bakah rorelna leh inthlanna hun te, member pension thlahna leh Khuallian programme ti tein hun anhmang a,  member 48 an awm mek a ni.

Attachment

title: MAMIT DISTRICT MIPUITE HRIATTIRNA
content:
441/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 8th of April, 2026 :Pu Suvigya S. Chandra, IAS, Deputy Commissioner-in thuchhuah a siam, The Mizoram Market (Regulation and Facilitation) Act, 2022 in thuneihna a pek angin  District Level Committee on Fixation of Price of Meat, Vegetables and Fruits on revision of Pork Rates chu a hnuai a mi ang hian a siam thar a ni.

Vawksa rate hi asa Kg 1, Rs. 450 a ni ang.

Rate siam that zawmlo chu dan anga hrem theih an ni.

Issued by, District Information & Public Relations Officer, Mamit District : Mamit

title: KAWRTHAH FOREST DIVISION-IN PUBLIC OUTREACH / GRIEVANCE REDRESSAL PROGRAMME HUN HMANG
content:
440/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 8th of May, 2026:Vawiin khan ICC Hall, Thuampui Veng, Zawinuam-ah Pu Karthikeyan V, DFO Kawrthah hoin Kawrthah Forest Division chuan a thawh hnihna atan "Kan ramngaw kan nunna" tih leh "Kan ramngaw hi kan nun khawchhuahna a ni" tih thupuia hmangin forest dan leh hrai te inhriattirna hun an hmang.

Pu Karthikeyan V, chuan Forest (Reserve Forest) chhunga cheng khaw mipuite dikna chanvo leh mawhphurnate mipuite hnenah hrilhfiahin, Tut-Langkaih Protected Council Reserved Forest chungchang sawifiahna te a nei a ni.

Vawiin programme-in a tum ber chu Forest ram chhunga cheng khaw mipui te'n Forest kaihhnawih dan an hriat te, an dikna leh mawhphurhna hriattir te leh mihringte leh ramngaw inkara inkungkaihna tha tak a awm zel theihna tura hmalak te a ni.

Tut-Langkaih Protected Council Reserved Forest chungchang an hriat dan questionnaire buatsaih chu mipui kalkhawm te'n ziakin an chhang a, inhrilhfiah a nih hnuah he mi chungchang vêk questionaire hi chhan tir leh an ni. Vawiin hun hi Zawlnuam khawchhunga Village Council member te, MUP, MHIP leh YΜΑ Committee member te nen hlawhtling taka hman a ni.

Mipui lam atangin Forest Department chunga an lungawihlohna leh harsatna an tawhte ngaihthlak a,inhrilhfiah ngaite hrilhfiahin a theih chinah chinfelpui dan tur te sawiho a ni bawk.

title: Legislative Assembly Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama’n LushAIGent tlangzarh
content:
439/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 8th May, 2026 :Vawiin khan Mizoram Legislative Assembly Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama chuan LushAIGent : Agentic AI chu BSI Hall, Aizawlah a tlangzarh.

Pu Lalbiakzama chuan Mizoramin AI-ah bungthar a kaina hun pawimawha a tel chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin “Hetiang ang thiamna ril bik nei Mizo chhulchhuak kan nei hi ka chhuang hle a ni” a ti. Hun hmang tlem zawk leh chhanna dik zawk chuan mihring nun a ti zangkhai a, a lo thlawna sum leh pai leh hun luangral tur a veng nghal ṭhin a, hlawkna min pe pah nghal bawk a ni, tih sawiin chu kan mamawh chhanna chu LushAIgent Agentic AI hian a paipawn a ni, a ti a.  Agentic AI bikah phei chuan Mizoram mai ni lo, India ramah a hmasa ber tur tlangzarh a ni ta chu lawmawm a tihzia zawiin Zofate tan malsawmna a nih ngei a beisei thu a sawi a ni.

LushAIgent hi Mizo mipuite, a bikin Sap ṭawng emaw Hindi emaw thiam lutuk lote pawhin an hman ṭangkai theih tura duan a ni a. Mizo ṭawngin ṭha takin a biak theih a, a hmangtu zawhnate Mizo ṭawng ngeiin, fiah takin a chhang let thei a ni. Mizo ṭawng leh English bakah Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu leh ṭawng dangte tiamin India ram ṭawng hrang hrang 12 lai a thiam a.Type kher ngai lovin Voice Note hmanga biak theih a ni.

Tawng danga mi dangin thu an thawn rang takin a hmangtu ṭawng thlan (entirnan, Mizo tawng)-in a lo letling nghal zung zung thei a. Ṭawng danga thuziah te pawh fiah tak leh awmze nei takin a letling thei a. Sap ṭawng emaw ṭawng danga a hmang tuin thu a ziah sa pawh tawngkam mawi zawk leh grammar dik zawkin a chulmam sak thei a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVIN DISTRICT NCORD COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
438/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 8th May, 2026 :Vawiin khan Deputy Commissioner, Conference Hall, Lawngtlaiah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaina in District NCORD Committee thutkhawm a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Tun dinhmunah Lawngtlai khawchhunga Ruihhlo lut a zia awm viau a, hei hi sawrkar leh NGO- te inkara thawhhona tha a awm vang a ni, a ti. Ruihhlo do kawngah tha thlah lo a, thahnem ngai taka thawh a nih chuan Lawngtlai chu 'Drug Free District' ah siam theih a nih tur thu a sawi. Bawrhsap chuan Ruihhlo do na kawngah fimkhur a ngai a,a bik takin ruihhlo man a nihin sawrkar orkar lama Law & Order kenfkawhtu leh Police, Excise lamte kan thawhpui thiam a pawimawh a ti. Lawngtlai District - a Ruihhlo umbo turin ' Operation Jericho' leh ' Drug Free District Campaign' kalpui mek a nih thu tarlangin, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan hei hian rah tha a chhuah mek tih tarlangin, mipuite thawhpuiah a sawm nghal bawk.

Vawiin NCORD Meeting - ah hian Meeting hmasaa hmalakna tur rel hrang hrangte bawkzui dan tlirhhona neih a ni a.Zirn In leh Kohhranah te ' Awareness Campaign' neih a nih thu ngaithlak niin, Police, Excise leh DRS- te report atanga a lan danin Ruihhlo tam tham man a awm lo a ni.Thutkhawmah hian State NCORD Committee - in 'Drug Free Village' a puanna tur atana hma lak dan tur sawiho niin State Level NCORD atanga SOP siam pawh Local Level thlenga hriattir nise tih a ni a. Ruihhlo lo luhna thin kawngte pawh theih ang anga ven niin, tun dinhmunah chuan Ruihhlo lo lut a tlem hle nia an hriat thu an tarlang a. NCORD Committee- in a lo rel tawh angin Rescue Centre - tlawh ni tawh in, Drop In Centre- pawh remchang hmasa ber ah tlawh nise tih a ni. Khualzin phur lirthei kaltlanga ruihlo thawn ruk a awm thin tih report an dawn angin, Police, Excise leh DRS ten- Joint Surprise checking - neih thin nise tih a ni bawk.

Vawiin Thutkhawmah hian District NCORD Committee Member- an tel tha hle a, Bawrhsap chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm hi a khar.

title: DM&R Minister-in World Red Cross Day 2026  a hawng
content:
437/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl: the 8th May 2026 :Vawiin khan Disaster management & Rehabilitation Department changtu Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan P&E Department Conference Hall, MINECO-ah, Indian Red Cross Society,Disaster Management & Rehabilitation Department, Mizoram Taxi Association leh Shalom Society-te tangho buatsaih, World Red Cross Day 2026 hmanhona chu khuallian niin a hawng a. Kumin World Red Cross Day puala Taxy driver thlan chhuahte hnenah chawimawina thilpek a hlan nghal a ni.

He hunah hian khuallian DM&R Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan thusawiin, a vawi khatna atana World Red Cross Day Mizorama hman a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Mizoram Taxi Association-te nena World Red Cross Day programme hmanho chu inhmeh leh tangkai hle a a hriat thu sawiin,midangte tana inpekna chu mihringte nih phung ropui tak a ni tih a sawi a. Minister chuan World Red Cross Day 2026 hmanna chu Mizoramin bung thar a kaina tur a ni a ti a. MTA member-te chu Mizoram hmel tilangtu an ni tih hre reng tura chahin, WRCD 2026 puala training chu hlawkthlak tak a hmang tur in duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

World Red Cross Day hi kum tinin thupui thlan chhuah neiin khawvel pumah May ni 8-ah hman thin a ni a. Kumin WRCD thupui chu "united in humanity"/mihring mihrinnaa inpumkhatin tih a ni. He ni hi khawvel hmun hrang hrang a Red Cross member, midangte tanpuina atana nun hlante hriat rengna hun atan te, midangte tanpui tur a inzirtirna ni atan leh Red Cross kalphung inhrilhhriatna hun atante hman thin a ni a. World Red Cross day 2026 pual hian IRCS, Mizoram State Branch chuan Mizoram Taxi Association member-te tan 1st aid training a buatsaih a ni.

Vawiina World Red Cross Day 2026 hawnna pual hian MTA member, an eizawnna kawnga mi chhuanawm tak tak Taxi driver thlan chhuahte hnenah chawimawina thilpek hlan niin, chung mite chu:

1. Vanlalhruaitluanga, Bethlehem Vengthlang.2. Pu P. Lalpianmawia, BVT.3. Pu P.C. Lalhruaitluanga, Bethlehem Veng leh.4. Pu Zonunsanga Varte, Khatla South-te an ni.

Vawiina World Red Cross Day 2026 hawnna hun hi Dr. Chawnglungmuana,Secretary, IRCS  (Mizoram Branch)-in kaihruaiin, kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Pi K. Lalrinzuali,  Chairman, IRCS (Mizoram Branch) hnen atangin thusawi ngaithlak a ni a. MTA member htlanchhuahte hnena chawimawina thilpek hlanna neih niin, Pu K. Lalrinliana, President,  MTA hnen atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni a. Hemi zawh hian IRCS (Mizoram Branch) life membership hlanna neih a ni a. Dr. Benjamin Lalrinpuia, Jt. Secy, IRCS (Mizoram Branch)  chuan lawmthu sawiin hawnna hun hi atitawp a ni.

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN LUNGLEIAH NCC FEST LEH PARASAILING CAMP HMANPUI
content:
436/2026-2027

Lunglei the 8th May 2026:Vawiin khan 2 Mizo Battalion NCC te bultumin Lunglei Thuamluaia Mualah National Cadet Corp (NCC) Fest leh 2 BN MAP Ground-a Parasailing Camp neih mek chu Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan khuallian niin a telpui.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, 2 Battalion NCC te hmalakna a fak a, kan thalai tam takten NCC zarah nun kawng dik an zawh a, ram tana mi hmantlak ni turin an inzir mek a ni. Mizoramin NCC Group Headquarters thar kan nei tawh a, phur takin hma an la, hna a thawk nasa a. Hun reilote chhungin an hmasawnna kan hmu nasa tawh hle. NCC a inhmang kan naupang tam takte hi sipaiah te, Police-ah te, Territorial Army ah te an lut tawh a ni.

Nu leh pate pawhin NCC hmalakna hi i thlawp ang u. Kan ramah ruihhlo a hluar avangin kan thalai tam takte nun a chhe mek a. Kaihruaitu tha an mamawh a. NCC hian thalaite kaihhruaina lamah tawn hriat an nei tha a, an thiam a, naupangte chu mahni inthunun thei, taima, tawrhchhel leh mi tumruh takah an chhuah thin. Sipaiah kal zui kher lo mah se an eizawnna kawngah an tangkaipuizui thin a ni, a ti.

Fest hmang tura thenawm state NCC Cadets lo kalte chungah lawmthu a sawi a. NCC chu hnam hrang hrangte inunauna tha zawk neihna hmun tha a ni, a ti. Fest hlawhtling tak buatsaihtu 2 Bn NCC chungah lawmthu a sawi bawk.

Fest-ah hian NCC lawmman hrang hrang sem a ni a, hnam lam entir a ni a, dawr (stall) tam tham tak hawn a ni bawk.

Chief Minister hi Pi Lalrinpuii, Health Minister leh Lunglei district MLA te Pu V. Malsawmtluanga, Pu T. Lalhlimpuia, Pu Lalramliana Papuia bakah Lt. Col Clement Lalhmingthanga te, Lunglei Municipal Council members te, Pi Navneet Mann, IAS, Lunglei DC leh district officials ten an tawiawm a ni.

Fest hi May ni 5 atanga ni 11 inkar neih tur a ni a. Mizorama NCC Fest hmasa ber a ni.

NCC Fest a telpui zawh hian Lunglei Health ATM, Lunglei District Hospital a mi chu a tlawh a, chumi zawhah Electric Venga Leitlangpui H/S a Astronomy Lab a tlawh leh bawk. Health ATM leh Astronomy Lab te hi Lunglei DC Pi Navneet Mann hmalaknaa CSR sum atanga hmuh an ni.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial P&E control room atanga Thingsai road panna kawng siam hna chak zawk a kalpui a nih theih nan lirthei tlan dan tur SP in ruahmanna siam
content:
435/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 8th May, 2026:Electric veng P&E control room atanga Thingsai road panna kawng chu siamthat hna chhunzawm mek a nih avangin Hnahthial SP, Pu Shivam Siddharth chuan 08.05.2026 (Zirtawpni) atanga ni 30.05.2026 (Inrinni) thleng P&E control room, Electric Veng, Hnahthial atanga Thingsai road panna kawngah lirthei tlan dan tur ruahmanna a siam.

Dt. 08.05.2026 - 30.05.2026 chhung hian 06:00 a.m. atanga 09:30 a.m. leh 12:30 p.m. atanga 01:00 p.m. inkarah kawng hawn a ni ang.

Thupek zawm lo chu MV Act Section 179 hmangin an chungah hmalak a ni ang.

Thupek hian Magistrate/Police/F&ES leh medical duty lirthei chevel te a huam lovang.

Attachment

title: STAND UP LAWNGTLAI (THO LAW DIR TUAH) HNUAIA TRAFFIC ENFORCEMENT TASK FORCE LEH CLEAN LAWNGTLAI COMMITTEE THUTKHAWM NEIH A NI
content:
434/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 8th May, 2016 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00 PM khan Deputy Commissioner, Lawngtlai Office Chamber- ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga hovin Stand Up Lawngtlai (Tho Law Dir Tuah) hnuaia 'Traffice Enforcement Task Force' leh 'Clean Lawngtlai Committee' thutkhawm neih a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Lawngtlai khawpuiin kawng hrang hranga hmelthar hmua, hmasawnna tha zawk a neih theih nana chak taka hmalak mek a nih thu a sawi a. A bik takin ' Stand up Lawngtlai (Tho Law Dir Tuah) hnuaiah District Administration leh LADC- ten thawhhona tha tak nei tih tarlangin, heihian rah tha a chhuah ngei ang a ti. Khawpui fai, thawl nuam leh chhenfakawm zawk siam turin 'Traffice Enforcement Task Force' leh 'Clean Lawngtlai Committee' ten theihtawp an chhuah mek tih tarlangin, mipuite pawh lo tawiawm tlat turin a sawm nghal bawk.

Pu K.Lalthanzara, Executive Secretary, LADC chuan Stand Up Lawngtlai (Tho Law Dir Tuah) kalpui mekah a taka hlawkna hmuh mek a ni, a ti a. Lawngtlai khawpui hmasawnna tura atana hmalakna hrang hrangah, LADC chuan a tih theih chin chinah theihtawp a chhuahzel tur thu a sawi a ni.

Pu HC Vanlalruatpuia, Transport Officer, LADC chuan Lirthei dah dan felfai zawk a awmtheih nan LADC chuan ruahmanna siama, thupek a tichhuah tawh thu a sawi a. Tun dinhmunah zankhuaa kawngkama Lirthei dahte chu 'Village Level Traffic Management Committee' hmalaknaa ' Parking Fee' khawn tawh niin, 'Parking leh No Parking' pawh mumal takin tihfel a nih tawh thu a tarlang a ni. Pu C.Lawmsangzuala, Sanitation Officer, LADC chuan khawpui cheimawi tura hmalakna hrang hrang sawizuana a nei a. Tun dinhmunah kawng intawhkhawmna (Junction) chei mek a nih thu tarlangin, Zero Waste Corner - pawh buaipui mek a nih thu a sawi.

Thutkhawmah hian Member- te an telkim tha hle a, Bawrhsap chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB DC HOVIN LIRTHEI ENDIK RUNPUI NEIH DAN TUR SAWIHO
content:
433/2026-2027

Kolasib, 8th May, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Office Chamber-ah Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia hovin Kolasib District chhunga lirthei chesual laka mipuite an him theih nan lirthei endik runpui (enforcement drive) kalpui dan tur sawiho a ni.

Thutkhawm kaihruaitu Kolasib DC chuan lirthei khalhtute leh mipuite an him theih nan theihtawp chhuah a ngaih thu a sawi a. Dan anga hmalakna kawngah tha thlah loh a pawimawh thu sawiin, a bikin rui chunga lirthei khalh leh kum tling lo lirthei khalh chu pawi thui tak thlentu a nih theih avangin theihtawpa khauh taka kalpui turin a chah a ni. Kolasib Superintendent of Police (SP) Pu Lalrinpuia Varte pawhin thu sawiin, mipuite him nan dan kengkawh kawngah khauh taka hmalak a tul thu a sawi ve bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmna in a rel angin Kolasib District Road Safety Committee hmalakna kal zel angin kan District-a lirthei khalhtute leh mipui an him tlan theih nan Kolasib District chhung hmun hrang hrangah Enforcement Staff (Transport), Traffic Police leh Magistrate, Kolasib ten lirthei kaihhnawih dan bawhchhiatna leh danin a phut lirthei document hrang hrang fel lote an endik dawn a . He hunah hian exhaust (silencer) ri ring (company in a vuah sa ni lo) te, Driving License nei lo lirthei khalhte, Helmet khum lo a lirthei khalhte, Two Wheeler-a mi pahnih aia tam inphurhte leh kum tlinglo lirthei khalhte endik a ni bawk ang. Lirthei khalhtu leh neitu zawng zawngte tha taka dan zawma, lo inhmakhua turin mipuite ngen an ni.

Lirthei khalhtu dan bawhchhia te hremna(Penalty) tlangpui chu hetiang hi a ni:

Driving licence neilo (Section 181) - Rs. 5000

Helmet khum lova lirthei khalh (Section 194(D)) - Rs. 1000

Two wheeler a mi pahnih aia tam inphurh (Section 194(C)) - Rs. 1000

Kum tlinglo lirthei khalh (Section 199(A)) - Rs. 25000

Rui chunga lirthei khalh (Section 185) - Rs. 10000

Attachment

title: SIAHA KHAWPUI CHHUNGAH SITE DEVELOPMENT KHAP
content:
432/2026-2027

Siaha the 8th May 2026:Fur ruahtui lo thleng tur laka invenna atan leh leimin laka mipui himna turin District Bawrhsap, Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte, District Disaster Management Authority Chairman, Siaha ni bawk chuan Disaster Management Act, 2005 Section 34(m) tlawh chhanin thupek a chhuah.

He thupek hmang hian Siaha khawpui chhungah in sak emaw hmunhma chei vel emaw hna thawh khap a ni a, October 2026 thla tawp thleng a huam ang. Tul bik thil a awm chuan DC Office atangin phalna lak hmasak tur a ni.

He thupek bawhchhia te chu Section 51 hmangin kum 1 thleng lung in tan emaw pawisa chawi emawa hremna pek theih an ni.

Attachment

title: INDIA HMARCHHAK A COOPERATIVE SOCIETIES TEN "SAHKAR SE SAMRIDDHI" TIH HMANGIN WORKSHOP AN NEI
content:
431/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 8th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram sawrkar hnuaiah Cooperation Department leh India sawrkar hnuaia Ministry of Cooperation ṭangkawpin India hmarchhak rama Cooperation Secretary-te leh Cooperative Societies-a Registars ten inhmuhkhawmna hun Mizoram Legislative Hall, Assembly house-ah hman niin; Ministry of Cooperation, Secretary Pu Dr Ashish Kumar Butani chuan he hun hi a kaihruai a ni.

Cooperation Department, Commissioner & Secretary, Pu Udit Prakash Rai chuan kalkhawm te chu lo lawmin, thusawina hun a hmang a, hmarchhak states a Cooperative Societies ten hma an sawn zel theih nana inhmuhkhawmna hun buatsaih a nih hi ṭha a tiin, hmalakna tur hrang hrangte- regional economics transformation, digital empowerment leh 'thawhhona aṭanga hmasawnna' (Sahkar Se Samriddhi) te an hman aṭanga thingtlang leh ramchhunga hmasawnna a awm theih nan ṭan la ho turin sawrkar department hrang hrangte leh kalkhawmte a sawm a ni.

NABARD Chairman Pu Shaji KV chuan thusawina hun neiin kalkawm te hnenah hmasawnna huapzo leh ngialnghet Hmarchhak ram ten an neih theih nan Cooperative Societies leh NABARD te an pawimawh thu a sawi a. A bik takin 6th schedule areas leh district hlaa harsatnate sukiang turin Cooperative Societies ten hna chak taka an thawh a ṭul thu sawiin, Assam leh Tripura ten hlawhtlina an neih aṭanga State dang te pawh kan inzir a ṭul thu a sawi bawk a ni. Pu Shaji KV chuan Cooperative Societies leh NABARD te hmalakna sawiin, India hmarchhak huamchhungah kum 2047 chhungin Multipurpose Primary Agriculture Cooperative Societies (MPACS) nuai 2 neih hman tum a nih thu a sawi a. Mizoram State Cooperative Bank pawh Scheduled Bank a hlankai a nih thu leh MPACS computerization program kalpui a nih thu a tarlang a. NABARD aṭanga technical leh handholding ṭanpuina an dawn theih tur thu leh he thil hian rualkhai taka hmasawnna hmarchhak ramah a thlen tur thu a sawi a ni.

Pi Pankaja Borah, General Manager, NABARD, Mizoram Regional Officer pawhin kal khawmte hnenah lawmthu sawina neiin Mizoramah Cooperative Societies hmarchhak ram te inhmuhkhawmna hun an thleng thei hi lawmawm a tih thu a sawia, NABARD nena thawhhona an nei thei hi lawmawm a tih thu sawi bawk in, hmasawnna huapzo leh thawhhona ṭha an neih theih a beisei. Mizoram chu state dangte khaikhin chuan Cooperative lamah te zawk angin lang mahse institutional leh financial support MPACS ten an neih aṭangin state dang te hmasawn rualin ke an pen ve zel theih a beisei thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Vawiin a inhmuhkhawmna ah hian Workshop nei telin, hengte hi zirho a ni:

Strengthening Value Chains and Market Linkage te, Cooperative Banking te, World's Largest Grains Storage Plan ( WLGSP) te, Strategy for Development of Cooperatives in the North-Eastern region by NEDFi leh a dangte hmangin kalkhawm ten training leh zirhona neih a ni.

Attachment

title: COMMANDANT, 1ST IR BN IN ST. MARIA GORETTI SCHOOL INVESTITURE CEREMONY A HMANPUI
content:
430/2026-2027

Kolasib, 8th May, 2026:Vawiin khan St. Maria Goretti School, Kolasib chuan an School Auditorium-ah Investiture Ceremony an hmang a. He hun hi Pu M.S. Dawngkima, MPS, Commandant, 1st IR Bn, Mualvum chuan Khuallian niin a hmanpui a, Sr. Mary Naulak BS, Headmistress in he hun hi a kaihruai a ni.

Khuallian Pu M.S. Dawngkima chuan thu sawiin, St. Maria Goretti School chu zirna kawngah Kolasib khua leh district mipuite tana sikul tangkai tak a nih thu leh, zirlai hlawhtling tak tak a lo chher chhuak tawh thin a ni, a ti a. Kawng hrang hrangah mipuite pawhin an tangkaipui thin hle a ni tih a sawi bawk.

Mizoram pum huapa zirlaite inelnaah leh Sawrkar hna ruak dila Competitive Exam hmachhawn kawngah Kolasib District chu tan lak a ngaih nasat thu a tarlang a. Zirlaite chu tumruhna nen an zirna uar sauh sauh turin a fuih nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT CHHUNGA SASCI HNUAIA HNATHAWHTE THLIRLETNA NEIH A NI
content:
429/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 8th May, 2026 :Vawiin chhun dar 12:00 Pm khan Deputy Commissioner, Lawngtlai Office Chamber- ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalriatsanga kaihhruaiin Lawngtlai District chhunga SASCI hnuai a hna thawhte thlirhona neih a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. SASCI hnuai a hnathawhte kumkhat chhung atana tih a ni a, amaherawh chu harsatna neuh neuh a awm thin avanga duh anga hna a thawh a chak theih a ni lo thin chu veiawm a tih thu a sawi a. Hnathawh chak loh leh hun tiam chhunga zawh a nih loh hian a leh pek a sum hmuh tur a dal thei tih tarlangin, a chak thei ang bera thawk turin hnathawktute a chah nghal a ni.

Review meeting- ah hian Lawngtlai District chhunga hna thawh hrang hrangte thlir ho na neih niin, an hnathawh dan leh an thawh chin ngaihthlak a ni a. Tun dinhmunah hun tiam chhunga zo thei tumah awm loin, June thla ral hma a 'extension' dil ngai vek an ni a. Thutkhawm chuan hnathawktuten chak zawka hna an thawhna tura hmalak ni se tiin, hnathawh dan thlir hona neih leh nise tih a ni.

Vawiin SASCI Review Meeting - ah hian Addl.DC, SDO (Sadar), Superintendent, DC Office, Lawngtlai, Contractor leh Manager, Construction & Consultancy te an tel  a ni. Thutkhawm hi Bawrhsap chuan lawmthu sawiin a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: DEPARTMENT FOR PROMOTION OF INDUSTRY AND INTERNAL TRADE (DPIIT) LEH COMMERCE, INDUSTRIES, GEOLOGY AND MINING DEPARTMENT HUAIHAWT IN SAMVAD ON UNNATI 2024 HMAN A NI
content:
428/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, 8th May, 2026 :Vawiin khan sawrkar laipui hnuaia Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT) leh Mizoram sawrkar hnuaia Department of Commerce & Industries tangkawp chuan UNNATI Scheme in a tum te inzirtirna leh inhrilhfiahna hun Royale Lalawi Hotel Conference Hall, Khatla ah an buatsaih a, Commerce & Industries minister Pu F. Rodingliana chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

He hunah hian minister Pu F. Rodingliana chuan thu sawiin hun rei tak chhung kan ram leilungin a zir tawk loh avangin investors ten rawn luh an hreh thin a, chu harsatna chu KMMTTP in a rawn thlak danglam mek a ni a ti a, international border thui tak kan neih te hi a hlutna hre tur leh hemi behchhan hian UNNATI Scheme hmang tangkai thiama, investors tam zawk hip lut thei tura tan la zual zel turin kal khawm te a chah a. UNNATI Scheme hnuaia inziak lut an tlem lutuk chu pawi a tih thu sawi langin, sawrkar laipui lama thuneitute pawhin awlsam zawka inziah luh a, mi tam zawkin he scheme hi an hman tangkai ngei theih nan a process ti awlsam se a duh thu a sawi bawk a ni. Minister hian UNNATI Registration Certificate sem nghalin, an registration approved tawh mi pasarih hnenah UNNATI registration certificate hi a hlan a ni.

DPIIT Director Pu Rajesh Panwar pawhin thu sawiin, Mizorama investor-te leh entrepreneur-te tana an inhawn thu leh zawhna leh harsatna an neih apiangte chu chinfelsak an inhuam thu a sawi a. UNNATI Scheme in a cover lo a nih pawhin sawrkar scheme hrang hrangte zirchiang a, hamthatna an dawn theih te hre tura hma la thin turin kalkhawmte a chah bawk a ni.

Pu Lalrinawma, Joint Director, Department of Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining chuan kalkhawmte hnenah Mizoramin industry lama hmasawn zel tura theihna a neih te tarlangin, Mizoram chu India ram tan South East Asia kalkawng pawimawh tak a ni mek a, Consumption Economy atanga Production and Exporting Economy a kan inleh chho mek thu leh, Mizoram sawrkar investment policy hrang hrang te kan hman tangkai chuan nasa taka hma kan sawn ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Pu Karampaul Singh, Nodal Officer, DPIIT chuan UNNATI SCHEME nihphung chu kalkhawmte hmaah tarlangin, he scheme hnuaia Mizoram dinhmun a sawifiah a, Mizoram chu North-East State dangte aia an pawisa dawn theih a tam zawk thu sawiin Mizoram tan vaibelchhe 453 lai dah a nih thu leh, mi pasarih chiahin registration an la ti chu a pawi a tih thu a sawi a, application 26 chauh Mizoram atang an la dawn thu a sawi a. Mizoram chu Zone – B, hlawkna tam zawk tel theihna zone a awm an nihna te chu hria a, tun aia nasa zawka scheme hi hmang tangkai turin kalkhawmte a chah a. Kalkhawmte hnen atangin an hriat duh ang te leh an harsatna neihte zawhna leh chhanna hun hman a ni bawk.

Pu Zorema Darkim UNNATI Project Implementing Unit chuan  kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu sawiin hun hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Saitual DEOC Emergency Contact Number chungchanga mipuite hriattirna
content:
427/2026-2027

Saitual, the 8th May, 2025:Saitual DEOC Emergency Contact Number chungchangah Saitual Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan a hnuaia tarlan ang hian thu a chhuah.

Kan hma a fur lo thleng mai tur laka lo inralrin lawk nan leh, chhiatna chi hrang hrang Saitual District mipuite ina ka tawh laka chak tak leh rang taka hna thawh a nih theih nan, District Emergency Operation Centre, Saitual District chuan emergency number a nei thar a. He number ah hian Saitual District chhunga chhiatna chi hrang hrang thleng te a rang thei ang bera inhriattir thin turin kan in hriattir e.

DEOC Emergency number - 9862708344

DEOC number hi mipuite tan engtik lai pawha biak theih tura duan a ni a. Saitual mipuite chhiatna laka kan lo him zel theih nan hemi number hi a tangkai thei ang bera hmang theuh turin kan inngen bawk e.
